svg.title: Sub-E Guide Post Array — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: Material: PETG (integral with tray) | All dimensions in mm | Scale noted per view

g.text: 1. Four guide posts at corners of 40 x 40 mm rectangle, centered at (80, 37.5) on rear wall exterior face.
2. Posts are printed integral with tray rear wall (Sub-A). No separate fasteners.
3. Mushroom caps retain release plate. Chamfered tip allows snap-over assembly (press plate onto posts from -Y direction).
4. Release plate travels 1.5 mm along +Y (toward wall) to compress John Guest collets.
5. Clearance fit: 3.5 mm post in 3.8 mm bore = 0.15 mm clearance per side.
6. Wall thickness shown as 3 mm (nominal, per Sub-A shell specification).
